---
title: "Charlie Hoose"
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  image: hooseheadshot2.jpg
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/charliehoose/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/cmhse
    - text: Email
      href: "mailto:charliehoose@g.ucla.edu"
---

## About

Hello! My name is Charlie Hoose and I am a fourth year Statistics and Data Science major with a Data Science Engineering minor at UCLA. I am from the Santa Ynez Valley in California (right above Santa Barbara) and have grown up there all my life. 

In my free time, I enjoy playing racket sports like tennis, pickleball, and ping pong, as well as working out and going on hikes in nature. I am a big fan of music of most genres, and often go to concerts and add to my vinyl collection. Moreover, I am a big foodie, and you can find me checking out new or interesting restaurants across LA. What I eat I try to recreate in the kitchen, too, as I have a passion for cooking which stemmed from experiences with my father and working in a professional kitchen in high school. If any of these hobbies or interests are up your alley, feel free to reach out!

Professionally, I have experience with Data Science, Data Analytics, Business Analytics, and Machine Learning. I am particularly interested in data modeling and trying to make sense of the world around me. Even more, I find passion in using data science to try to make the world a better place, which led me to certain projects and experiences with the main goal of improving the quality of human life. Whether it be via wildfire prediction and evacuation or community reinvestment, I find it important to use my skills to benefit the broader public.

You can view my resume [here](/CharlieHooseResume.pdf).
